mapper.insert: insert into rechargereturn (userId, roleId, createSid, rechargeTotalMoney, returnGold, returnTime,userName, platformAccount) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{createSid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rechargeTotalMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{returnGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{returnTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{platformAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update rechargereturn set roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT},createSid =#{createSid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, returnGold =#{returnGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, returnTime = #{returnTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
